zh.lifeSummary: 當Christine Etheldreia Baker於1475年6月15日出生在英國貝德福爾艾德沃斯時，她的父親Bruce Baker27歲，母親Lady Mary Etheldreia Belchum26歲。她於1502年與Sir John Spencer van Mylles, Knight在英國英格蘭貝德福爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1560年6月16日在英國英格蘭貝德福爾斯托福爾德享年85歲，埋葬在英國素可海斯廷斯 聖 克萊門特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christine Etheldreia Baker于1475年6月15日出生在英国貝德福爾艾德沃斯时，她的父亲Bruce Baker27岁，母亲Lady Mary Etheldreia Belchum26岁。她于1502年与Sir John Spencer van Mylles, Knight在英国英格兰貝德福爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1560年6月16日在英国英格兰貝德福爾斯托福爾德享年85岁，埋葬在英国素可海斯廷斯 聖 克萊門特。

nameMeanings.name: Baker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name, from Middle English bakere, Old English bæcere, a derivative of bacan ‘to bake’. It may have been used for someone whose special task in the kitchen of a great house or castle was the baking of bread, but since most humbler households did their own baking in the Middle Ages, it may also have referred to the owner of a communal oven used by the whole village. The right to be in charge of this and exact money or loaves in return for its use was in many parts of the country a hereditary feudal privilege. Compare Miller . Less often the surname may have been acquired by someone noted for baking particularly fine bread or by a baker of pottery or bricks.

Americanized form (translation into English) of surnames meaning ‘baker’, for example Dutch Bakker , German Becker and Beck , French Boulanger and Bélanger (see Belanger ), Czech Pekař, Slovak Pekár, and Croatian Pekar .

History: Baker was established as an early immigrant surname in Puritan New England. Among others, two men called Remember Baker (father and son) lived at Woodbury, CT, in the early 17th century, and an Alexander Baker arrived in Boston, MA, in 1635.

variants.name: Miller
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name for a miller. The standard modern vocabulary word represents the northern Middle English term miller, an agent derivative of mille ‘mill’, reinforced by Old Norse mylnari (see Milner ). In southern, western, and central England Millward (literally, ‘mill keeper’) was the usual term. In North America, the surname Miller has absorbed many cognate surnames from other languages, for example German Müller (see Mueller ), Dutch Mulder and Molenaar , French Meunier , Italian Molinaro , Spanish Molinero , Hungarian Molnár (see Molnar ), Slovenian, Croatian, and Serbian Mlinar , Polish Młynarz or Młynarczyk (see Mlynarczyk ). Miller (including in the senses below) is the seventh most frequent surname in the US.

South German, Swiss German, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of Müller ‘miller’ (see Mueller ) and, in North America, also an altered form of this. This form of the surname is also found in other European countries, notably in Poland, Denmark, France (mainly Alsace and Lorraine), and Czechia; compare 3 below.
Americanized form of Polish, Czech, Croatian, Serbian, and Slovenian   Miler   ‘miller’, a surname of German origin.

variants.name: Baxter
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English baxter ‘baker’ (from Old English bæcestre ‘baker’, earlier ‘female baker’, the feminine equivalent of bæcere). Compare Baker .

nameMeanings.name: Christine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Christina .  It was popular in the medieval period, when it appears to have been used interchangeably with   Christian  , and again in Britain at the end of the 19th century. In the United States it was particularly popular from the 1950s to the 1970s.

variants.name: Christeen
meanings: form of   Christina .  It was popular in the medieval period, when it appears to have been used interchangeably with   Christian  , and again in Britain at the end of the 19th century. In the United States it was particularly popular from the 1950s to the 1970s.

nameMeanings.name: Etheldreia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of the Old English female personal name Æðelþryð ( see Audrey ). It was taken up as a given name in the 19th‐century, but is now very rare.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Christine Etheldreia Baker was born on 15 June 1475, in Edworth, Bedfordshire, England, her father, Bruce Baker, was 27 and her mother, Lady Mary Etheldreia Belchum, was 26. She married Sir John Spencer van Mylles, Knight in 1502, in Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 16 June 1560, in Stotfold, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 85, and was buried in Hastings St Clement, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christine Etheldreia Baker est née le 15 juin 1475, à Edworth, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Bruce Baker, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Lady Mary Etheldreia Belchum, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Spencer van Mylles, Knight en 1502, à Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 16 juin 1560, à Stotfold, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 85 ans, et a été enterrée à Hastings St Clement, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christine Etheldreia Baker am 15. Juni 1475 in Edworth, Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Bruce Baker 27 und ihre Mutter Lady Mary Etheldreia Belchum 26. Sie hat 1502 in Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom Sir John Spencer van Mylles, Knight geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 16. Juni 1560 im Alter von 85 Jahren in Stotfold, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Hastings St Clement, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christine Etheldreia Baker è nata il il 15 giugno 1475 nel Edworth, Bedfordshire, England, sua padre, Bruce Baker, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Lady Mary Etheldreia Belchum, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Spencer van Mylles, Knight nel 1502, nel Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 16 giugno 1560, nel Stotfold, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 85 anni, e fu sepolta a Hastings St Clement, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Christine Etheldreia Bakerが1475年6月15日にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアエドウオルスで生まれた時，父Bruce Bakerは27歳，母Lady Mary Etheldreia Belchumは26歳であった。1502年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアでSir John Spencer van Mylles, Knightと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1560年6月16日にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアストトフォルドで85歳で死去し，イギリススセックスハスティングズ スト クレメントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Christine Etheldreia Baker(이)가 1475년 6월 15일 영국 베드퍼드실르 에드워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Bruce Baker(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Mary Etheldreia Belchum(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1502년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르에서 Sir John Spencer van Mylles, Knight(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1560년 6월 16일 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 스토트폴드에서 85세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 하스틴그스 스트 클레멘트에 묻혔다.

pt.15 June 1475–16 June 1560: 15 de junho de 1475–16 de junho de 1560
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christine Etheldreia Baker nasceu em 15 de junho de 1475, em Edworth, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Bruce Baker, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Lady Mary Etheldreia Belchum, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Spencer van Mylles, Knight em 1502, em Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 16 de junho de 1560, em Stotfold, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 85 anos, e foi sepultada em Hastings St Clement, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christine Etheldreia Baker родилась 15 июня 1475 г. в местности эдворт, бедфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Bruce Baker было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Mary Etheldreia Belchum, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Spencer van Mylles, Knight в 1502 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 16 июня 1560 г. в местности стотфолд, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 85 лет и была похоронена в местности хастингс ст клемент, суссекс, Англия.

es.15 June 1475–16 June 1560: 15 de junio de 1475–16 de junio de 1560
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christine Etheldreia Baker nació el 15 de junio de 1475, en Edworth, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Bruce Baker, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Lady Mary Etheldreia Belchum, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Sir John Spencer van Mylles, Knight en 1502, en Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 16 de junio de 1560, en Stotfold, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 85 años, y fue sepultada en Hastings St Clement, Sussex, Inglaterra.
